purpose: Close the rejected 2THICK BX20 proposal as a duplicate identity after canonical domain overlap validation.

entries.notes: BX20 records validation rejected 2THICK as a separate entity because its canonical first-party domain, eliteness.network, is already assigned to E3 entity hei_ex_000855. The candidate is terminally closed as duplicate and must not return as new entity-growth work without an explicit identity-separation review.
